scenarios.goal: You want to manage your reminders and to-do lists related to organizing and maintaining your files and storage, such as cleaning up the Downloads folder, reviewing shared cloud folders, managing storage alerts, and keeping important documents (like tax documents, passport scan, and resume) up to date and easy to find.
scenarios.agent_context: OpenClaw is an open-source personal AI assistant that runs on your own hardware. It connects to messaging platforms like WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, and iMessage to help users automate their daily lives. The assistant features persistent memory across sessions, proactive communication, and full system access to execute real tasks like sending emails, managing calendars, controlling smart home devices, and organizing files. It is designed for personal productivity, offering a unified assistant experience across all devices and platforms.

knowledge.content:
My Smart Home Setup

Devices

Living Room

Smart TV: Samsung 65" (Device: living_room_tv)

Main lights: Philips Hue (3 bulbs, dimmable, color)

Floor lamp: Smart plug controlled

Thermostat: Nest (Zone: Main)

Speaker: Sonos One

Bedroom

Ceiling light: Philips Hue (2 bulbs, dimmable)

Bedside lamps: Smart plugs (left and right)

Smart blinds: Lutron (automated sunrise open)

Air purifier: Connected to smart plug

Kitchen

Overhead lights: Smart switch (on/off only)

Under-cabinet lights: LED strip (dimmable)

Coffee maker: Smart plug (scheduled 6:30 AM weekdays)

Smart display: Google Nest Hub

Office

Desk lamp: Philips Hue (1 bulb, color)

Monitor light bar: Smart plug

Standing desk: Autonomous (preset heights saved)

Garage

Main light: Smart switch

Garage door: MyQ connected

Security camera: Ring (motion alerts enabled)

Front Door

Smart lock: August (auto-lock after 10 PM)

Doorbell: Ring Video Doorbell

Porch light: Smart bulb (motion activated after sunset)

Scenes

"Good Morning"

Open bedroom blinds

Set thermostat to 72°F

Turn on kitchen lights to 75%

Start coffee maker

"Movie Night"

Dim living room lights to 20%

Turn off floor lamp

Set TV input to streaming

Close blinds

"Leaving Home"

Turn off all lights

Lock front door

Set thermostat to 65°F

Arm security cameras

"Goodnight"

Turn off all lights

Lock all doors

Set thermostat to 68°F

Arm security system

Current Status

Thermostat: Currently set to 71°F (Auto mode)

Front door: Locked

Garage door: Closed

Security: Armed (Away mode)

Living room lights: Off

All blinds: Closed

Preferences

Preferred temperature: 71-73°F during day, 68°F at night

Lights auto-off: 11 PM

Motion detection: Active from 10 PM to 6 AM
